version: Modied Leegao Bcn Layer By Fcharan / WinlatorMali Dev
notes: Better Performance / Stability On Some Devices compared to offical leegao version
Leegao BCn -> ETC2 Transcoding Prototype. Enables ETC2 transcoding for significantly lower VRAM usage (1/3 to 1/2 of full quality). Set USE_IMAGE_VIEW=0 to enable.
